hooks.command: FILE_PATH=$(python3 -c 'import sys,json; d=json.loads(sys.stdin.read()) if sys.stdin.readable() else {}; t=d.get("tool_input",{}); print(t.get("file_path") or t.get("filePath") or "")' 2>/dev/null || echo ''); if [ -n "$FILE_PATH" ]; then case "$FILE_PATH" in CNAME|*/CNAME) echo 'Blocked: CNAME is a protected file and cannot be edited.' >&2; exit 2;; *.jpg|*.jpeg|*.png|*.gif|*.webp|*.svg|*.ico) echo 'Blocked: Image binary files cannot be edited directly.' >&2; exit 2;; esac; fi; exit 0
